samples.text: Alice is taller than Bob. Bob is taller than Charlie. Is Charlie taller than Alice?
Alice has greater height than Bob. Bob has greater height than Charlie. Does Charlie have greater height than Alice?
Bob is shorter than Alice. Charlie is shorter than Bob. Is Charlie taller than Alice?
Alice ranks above Bob in height. Bob ranks above Charlie in height. Does Charlie rank above Alice in height?

If one person is taller than a second person, and the second person is taller than a third person, then the third person cannot be taller than the first person. Alice is taller than Bob, and Bob is taller than Charlie. Is Charlie taller than Alice?
Alice is taller than Bob. The sky is often blue. Bob is taller than Charlie. Is Charlie taller than Alice?
